en-US.name: Grown Music
en-US.summary: Play your grown Music library on your Echo.
en-US.description: A self-hosted Alexa skill that plays the music library from your grown workspace. Say "Alexa, open grown music" to start your library shuffled, or ask for a specific artist or album.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask grown music to play my music
Alexa, ask grown music to play the Beatles

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Say 'Alexa, open grown music' to start playback. Requires the grown server reachable at the HTTPS endpoint with GROWN_ALEXA_SECRET set.
